name: Printed Rectangle Metal Easter Basket with Bunnies - Spritz™
description:
Add a touch of whimsy to your Easter celebrations with the Printed Rectangle Metal Easter Basket with Bunnies - Spritz™. Crafted from durable steel, this basket features a charming bunny design and a multicolored palette that adds a playful vibe. Its rectangular shape offers ample space for treats and goodies, while the sturdy construction ensures it can be used year after year. Perfect for Easter egg hunts or as a decorative centerpiece.

Spritz™: Pops of joy that make the moment™
